COMPONENT: Health informatics pioneer and the father of LOINC
DefinitionDescription: This term honors the long-standing contributions of Dr. Clement J. McDonald, the founder of LOINC and health informatics pioneer. Dr. McDonald's dedication, innovation, and hands-on contributions helped develop and continually improve medical informatics and health data standards.

LONG_COMMON_NAME: Health informatics pioneer and the father of LOINC
